title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at ECIL Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Software Engineer at ECIL Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
ECIL Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Software Engineer for our Nagpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ECIL Holdings Services:
ECIL Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ECIL Holdings Services!
